title: Domix's Cobblemon GUI
description: A very simple resource pack for the awesome Cobblemon mod :)
body:
## **Domix's Cobblemon GUI**
**Domix's Cobblemon GUI** is a very simple resource pack that:
- Makes all vanilla GUIs dark themed
- Adds a pokéball into the inventory background
- Adds custom **[Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)** themed Main Menu

It's meant to be used with **Cobblemon**. But you can also use it without the mod :)
- Also check out my other [**Resource Pack**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/domixs-pink-cobblemon)

[![button](https://i.imgur.com/8QhTSBR.png)](https://discord.gg/3Cx2NHdpef)

[![button](https://i.imgur.com/2NwtoRu.png)](https://ko-fi.com/domixcze)

[![button](https://i.imgur.com/OwEsI1o.png)](https://twitter.com/DomixCZE)
